message:
feat(wasm): add panic hook with console.error forwarding for WASM showcase

Install a custom panic hook that routes Rust panics to the browser's
console.error() for visibility during WASM debugging:
- Add console_error() helper that accesses console via js_sys::global()
  and Reflect, with graceful fallback if console is unavailable
- Add install_panic_hook() with std::sync::Once guard for idempotency
- Hook is installed both at wasm_start() (module initialization) and
  in ShowcaseRunner::new() (belt-and-suspenders for lazy-init hosts)
- Panic messages include file:line:column location when available

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
